name: Intel Core i5 13400F 13th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i5 13400F 13th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i5 13400F 13th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i5 13400F 13th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.45,000. This CPU offers 10 cores (6 Performance + 4 Efficient) and 16 threads with boost clock speeds up to 4.6 GHz, delivering smooth performance for gaming and daily multitasking, and it requires a discrete GPU since it has no integrated graphics.
